---
title: "Grammar"
format:
  html: default
  revealjs:
    output-file: grammar-slides.html
  pdf:
    output-file: grammar-handout.pdf
  docx:
    output-file: grammar.docx
---

{{< include _copilot-disclaimer.qmd >}}

Clear grammar removes friction between your ideas and your reader.
This chapter collects a few grammatical habits
that consistently make scientific writing easier to read.

## Relative pronouns

{{< include grammar/relative-pronouns.qmd >}}

## Demonstrative pronouns

{{< include grammar/demonstrative-pronouns.qmd >}}
